downstream_consumers: src/utils/logger.ts (imported by 47 new files after migration)

risks.title: Wrong relative import path for logger
risks.mitigation: Compute import depth per file before editing. Run tsc after each phase — a bad path is caught immediately as a module-not-found error.

risks.title: console.log in CLI files accidentally touched
risks.mitigation: Phase scope is strictly non-CLI. Verify each phase's file list against src/cli/ exclusion before editing.

risks.title: Verbose debug output suppressed unexpectedly
risks.mitigation: Map console.log used for diagnostic/debug output to logger.debug (gated by verbose flag). console.log used for informational progress → logger.info. Document mapping decision in plan.

risks.title: scanner.ts (41 calls) has mixed log levels — some are errors, some are info
risks.mitigation: Read each call site before migrating. console.error → logger.error, console.warn → logger.warn, console.log → logger.info or logger.debug based on context.

decision_records.rationale: src/cli/*.ts uses console.log for user-facing terminal output (progress, results, errors). This is intentional UX, not internal logging. Replacing with logger would suppress output or require logger verbose-mode to be on by default — a behavior change. CLI files are a separate, follow-on concern.

decision_records.decision: Call-level mapping: console.log → logger.info, console.error → logger.error, console.warn → logger.warn
decision_records.rationale: Diagnostic/debug console.log calls in hot paths (scanner, pipeline) should map to logger.debug so they are suppressed by default and only visible in verbose mode. Progress/status console.log → logger.info. Each file must be read before editing to apply the correct level.

decision_records.decision: Phase split by call density (high-count → Phase 1/2, long-tail → Phase 3/4)
decision_records.rationale: Phases 1 and 2 cover the high-density files (76 calls in 11 files). Phases 3 and 4 sweep the long tail (122 calls in 36 files). This ensures early phases provide the most impact and tsc gates catch import-path errors before the long tail is touched.
